## Summary

## Checks

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Buildchain `Build` workflow passes
- [ ] Buildchain `Verify` workflow passes

## Governance

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, secrets, or private logs.
- [ ] No unpublished reviewer correspondence or private operational data.
- [ ] Provider/API/data claims are sourced or clearly marked as future work.
- [ ] Public branding and trademark language stays factual.
